subcodes.first_line: These are the days of farewell; grief hath seized the people of God, inasmuch as the Fast, which is the cause of refinement and the means of reformation and [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایام وداعست حزن اهل الله اخذ نموده چه که صوم که علت تهذیب و سبب اصلاح و
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times, @law of fasting, @poems and quotation from poetry
